header.headline: IR Pipeline Flow
header.subtitle: Bring the legacy IR flow asset into the broader architecture-map family so the full mix sees it directly.

ingest.title: Graph Capture
ingest.body: Capture the upstream IR contract before lowering loses the visible structure.

shape.title: Shape / Refine
shape.body: Normalize and annotate the graph into a shape the lowerer can preserve.

lower.title: Lowering Path
lower.body: Convert the refined IR into runtime-facing artifacts while keeping provenance visible.

runtime.title: Runtime Output
runtime.body: Emit the concrete runtime handoff that later tools and probes inspect.

outcome.title: Visible Pipeline
outcome.body: The map is useful when every stage boundary stays legible after lowering.

footer.note: Legacy architecture assets should be explicit seeds in the full gen1 mix, not only inherited history.
